coverage_note: No labeled real-data contract ground truth; synthetic calibration does not transfer automatically.

evidence_assessment.clinical / device relevance: not evaluated; no clinical or safety certification
evidence_assessment.missing population: robots, operators, and tasks outside this dataset revision
evidence_assessment.missing sensor modality: torque, controller internals, and calibrated frame metadata
evidence_assessment.missing validation setting: active on-robot separating probes and deployment shift
evidence_assessment.strong evidence: none sufficient for a unique contract
evidence_assessment.weak evidence: finite diagonal-affine grammar and a single validation corpus

probe_utility.note: A probe is a proposal only; execute it only after device-specific bounds are supplied.
